Ankh.effect: Create a copy of a random Joker, destroy all other Jokers

Aura.effect: Add Foil, Holographic, or Polychrome effect to 1 selected card

Black Hole.effect: Upgrade every poker hand by 1 level

Deja Vu.effect: Add a Red Seal to 1 selected card

Ectoplasm.effect: Add Negative to a random Joker, -1 hand size

Familiar.effect: Destroy 1 random card in hand, add 3 random Enhanced face cards

Grim.effect: Destroy 1 random card in hand, add 2 random Enhanced Aces

Hex.effect: Add Polychrome to a random Joker, destroy all other Jokers

Immolate.effect: Destroys 5 random cards in hand, gain $20

Incantation.effect: Destroy 1 random card in hand, add 4 random Enhanced numbered cards

Medium.effect: Add a Purple Seal to 1 selected card

Ouija.effect: Converts all cards in hand to a single random rank (-1 hand size)

Sigil.effect: Converts all cards in hand to a single random suit

The Soul.effect: Creates a Legendary Joker (Must have room)

Talisman.effect: Add a Gold Seal to 1 selected card

Trance.effect: Add a Blue Seal to 1 selected card

Wraith.effect: Creates a random Rare Joker, sets money to $0
